parameters.jsCode:
const rows = [
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-01', rating: '1', text: "I can't export more than 50 items at a time. This is completely unusable for our team of 200." },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-03', rating: '2', text: 'Bulk export has been requested for 2 years. Still not there.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-10', rating: '1', text: 'No bulk export = switching to competitor next month.' },
  { source: 'G2', date: '2025-10-28', rating: '2', text: 'The export limit is a dealbreaker for enterprise use.' },
  { source: 'G2', date: '2025-11-05', rating: '3', text: 'Would be great to export everything at once instead of page by page.' },
  { source: 'Typeform', date: '2025-11-12', rating: '', text: 'Our team wastes 2 hours a week manually exporting in batches.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-02', rating: '3', text: 'The mobile app crashes every time I try to upload a PDF over 10MB.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-07', rating: '1', text: 'Crashed 4 times today on iOS 17. Unusable.' },
  { source: 'G2', date: '2025-10-30', rating: '2', text: 'PDF uploads are unreliable. Lost work twice.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-09', rating: '2', text: 'Upload bugs are killing my productivity.' },
  { source: 'Typeform', date: '2025-11-11', rating: '', text: 'PDF support is broken on the latest iOS update.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-01', rating: '4', text: 'Would love dark mode. Eyes hurt after long sessions.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-06', rating: '4', text: 'Please add dark mode! Would use this so much more at night.' },
  { source: 'G2', date: '2025-11-02', rating: '3', text: 'Dark mode would be a nice quality of life improvement.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-08', rating: '5', text: 'Love the app but dark mode is the one missing thing.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-10-29', rating: '2', text: 'Notifications are completely broken. I miss deadlines because of this.' },
  { source: 'G2', date: '2025-11-04', rating: '2', text: 'Notification system is unreliable. Critical for our workflow.' },
  { source: 'Typeform', date: '2025-11-13', rating: '', text: "Missed 3 deadlines because notifications didn't fire. This is a serious bug." },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-10', rating: '1', text: 'How is the notification system still broken after the last update?' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-05', rating: '3', text: 'Can you add calendar sync? Would be amazing to see tasks in Google Calendar.' },
  { source: 'G2', date: '2025-10-31', rating: '4', text: 'Calendar integration would make this a 5-star product.' },
  { source: 'App Store', date: '2025-11-08', rating: '4', text: 'Would love Google Calendar or Outlook sync.' }
];

return rows.map(function(row) { return { json: row }; });
